action.reasoning: Observation: I'm still encountering issues with the Qwen2.5-VL model processing. The error shows that the processor is expecting a text argument when processing images, but I'm only passing images. This is a fundamental misunderstanding of how the Qwen2.5-VL processor works. Looking at the error in the exploration script, it seems that when processing images alone, the processor still needs some text context. I need to fix the dataset implementation to properly handle the Qwen2.5-VL processor requirements. The issue is that I'm trying to process images without text context in the exploration script.
